title: Release process
content: We cut releases every Thursday. Tag main, run the release workflow, then announce in the #engineering channel. Hotfixes can ship any day with a lead's approval.

title: Deploy rollback
content: To roll back a bad deploy, re-run the release workflow with the previous git tag. Page the on-call engineer if customer traffic is affected.

title: On-call rotation
content: On-call rotates weekly, handed off Mondays at 10am. The on-call engineer owns pages, incident response, and the incident retro. Escalate to the team lead after 30 minutes.

title: Expense policy
content: Expenses under 100 dollars need no pre-approval. Submit receipts in the finance portal within 30 days. Travel over 500 dollars requires a manager sign-off first.

title: Onboarding checklist
content: New hires get a laptop on day one, access to Slack and the code repos by day two, and a buddy for their first month. Complete the security training within two weeks.

title: Billing system
content: The billing system runs on Stripe. Ada owns it. Invoices generate on the first of the month. Failed payments retry three times over ten days before the account is paused.

title: Data retention
content: Customer logs are kept for 90 days, then deleted. Backups of the primary database are retained for one year in encrypted cold storage.

title: Support SLA
content: Enterprise customers get a four-hour first-response SLA during business hours. Standard customers get one business day. Critical outages are acknowledged within 30 minutes regardless of tier.

title: Coffee machine
content: The office espresso machine is on the third floor kitchen. Descale it monthly. Beans are restocked every Friday.

title: VPN access
content: Request VPN access through the IT portal. Approvals take up to one business day. The VPN is required to reach staging and internal admin tools.

title: Code review
content: Every pull request needs one approval before merge. Reviews should happen within one business day. Large changes should be split into reviewable chunks.

title: Incident retro
content: After any incident we run a blameless retro within three business days. The output is a written timeline, root cause, and action items with owners and due dates.
